the-great-grand-superhero.reason: Skip this one unless you're desperate for franchise content. The generic title suggests another disposable superhero entry without the theatrical spectacle that justifies the ticket price.

the-last-whale-singer.reason: Skip this one unless you enjoy overwrought environmental messaging delivered through clunky dialogue. The whale song sequences can't save a script that mistakes volume for profundity.

bandar.reason: Not worth the trip for this unfocused portrait. The 90-minute runtime drags without enough insight to justify the theatrical experience.

the-birdcage-30th-anniversary.reason: See it for the big screen energy that made this a hit. Williams and Lane's physical comedy plays better with a crowd than at home.

f1-on-apple-tv-live-in-monaco-race.reason: Worth it only if you want the communal sports bar atmosphere. The Monaco circuit offers the season's most prestigious race weekend.
